flows.name: Contoso Lead Scoring & Routing
flows.trigger: When a lead is created or updated (Dataverse trigger)

flows.name: Deal Desk Approval Routing
flows.trigger: When a Deal Desk Review is created

flows.name: Notify Manager on High-Priority Escalation
flows.trigger: When a row is added (con_escalation)

flows.name: Sync CSAT Survey Responses to Service Feedback
flows.trigger: When a survey response is submitted (Customer Voice)

flows.name: SLA Breach Risk Escalation
flows.trigger: When con_slabreachrisk changes to High or Breached

flows.name: Truck Stock Replenishment Request
flows.trigger: When msdyn_availablequantity falls below reorder point

flows.name: Certification Expiry Warning for Resources
flows.trigger: Scheduled daily recurrence evaluating con_certexpirydate

flows.name: Contoso Time Entry Auto-Submit Reminder
flows.trigger: Scheduled (weekly, Friday 16:00)

flows.name: Staffing Request Fulfillment Routing
flows.trigger: When a row is created (con_resourcerequest)

flows.name: Campaign Brief Approval Routing
flows.trigger: When con_approvalstatus set to In Review

flows.name: Event Registration Confirmation
flows.trigger: On create of Event Registration

flows.name: Data Source Health Alert to Teams
flows.trigger: On Create where con_refreshstatus = Failed

flows.name: DSR Delete Propagation
flows.trigger: On Create where con_consenttype = DSR - Delete

flows.name: Capex Budget Check Flow
flows.trigger: On con_capexrequest status change to Submitted

flows.name: Exchange Rate Sync Flow
flows.trigger: Scheduled daily 05:00 UTC

flows.name: Generate PO in F&O on Approval
flows.trigger: When con_approvalstatus = Approved

flows.name: Shipment Delivery Notification
flows.trigger: When con_shipmentstatus changes to Delivered

flows.name: Curbside Handoff Notification
flows.trigger: When con_handoffstatus changes to Customer Arrived

flows.name: Price Match Approval
flows.trigger: When a price match request is created

flows.name: Channel Data Publish Trigger
flows.trigger: When a pricing rule is created or updated

flows.name: Leave Balance Notification Flow
flows.trigger: When a leave request is approved (Dataverse)

flows.name: New Hire Onboarding Orchestration
flows.trigger: When a worker is created (Dataverse)

flows.name: Termination Access Deprovisioning
flows.trigger: When cdm_employmentenddate is set (Dataverse)

flows.name: Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch
flows.trigger: When a conversation is closed (Dataverse trigger)

flows.name: Sync Channel Budget from Finance
flows.trigger: Recurrence (nightly)

flows.name: Environment Provisioning Approval
flows.trigger: When a row is created (con_environmentinventory, con_lifecyclestate = Requested)

flows.name: Orphaned Flow & App Detector
flows.trigger: Scheduled - daily 02:00 UTC

flows.name: Compliance Attestation Reminder
flows.trigger: Scheduled - weekly Monday 08:00
